ideation: This animation sequence simulates a robot directing traffic using its arms, mimicking the horizontal signals of a traffic light.  The robot will use both arms to signal the 'stop' and 'go' directions. Frame 1 will show the robot’s arms extended horizontally, signaling 'stop'. Frame 2 will show the arms transitioning downwards and slightly inward, like preparing for a 'go' signal. Frame 3 will show the arms angled downward and slightly inward as if giving a 'go' signal. Frame 4 will show the arms returning to the horizontal 'stop' position.

frames.beat: arms extend wide, a firm stop signal
arms begin to lower, preparing for movement
arms point down and in, signaling go
arms return to the stop position
